title: Amtech S4400 6 Piece Hose Clip Set
features: DURABLE: These hose clips have an anti-rust zinc coating and are ideal for garden and household use
SIZES: The hose clamp set includes 2 of each of sizes 13mm (0.5"), 19mm (0.75") and 25mm (1")
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 6pc Hose Clip Set See more
